attribute.name: domain
attribute.expr: eval: (__parent__?.reportType ?: tenderReportConfig?.reportType) == 1 ? "self.metaModel.name = 'CallTenderNeed' AND (self.relationship IS NULL OR self.relationship NOT IN ('OneToMany', 'ManyToMany')) AND self.name NOT IN ('attrs', 'archived', 'importId', 'importOrigin', 'processInstanceId')" : "self.metaModel.name = 'CallTenderOffer' AND (self.relationship IS NULL OR self.relationship NOT IN ('OneToMany', 'ManyToMany')) AND self.name NOT IN ('attrs', 'archived', 'importId', 'importOrigin', 'processInstanceId')"

attribute.name: domain
attribute.expr: eval: (__parent__?.reportType ?: tenderReportConfig?.reportType) == 1 ? "self.model = 'com.axelor.apps.purchase.db.CallTenderNeed' AND self.type NOT IN ('one-to-many', 'many-to-many', 'json-one-to-many', 'json-many-to-many')" : "self.model = 'com.axelor.apps.purchase.db.CallTenderOffer' AND self.type NOT IN ('one-to-many', 'many-to-many', 'json-one-to-many', 'json-many-to-many')"
